summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with strong statistical and machine learning foundations applied to real-world classification and anomaly detection problems. Trained a weighted ensemble combining XGBoost with fine-tuned DistilBERT achieving 99.96% AUROC on a held-out evaluation set, conducted systematic model comparisons using ROC curves, confusion matrices, and SHAP feature importance analysis, and designed normalized SQL schemas for storing and querying large-scale model outputs and metadata. Proficient in Python with Pandas, Scikit-learn, and XGBoost for data extraction, feature engineering, and predictive modeling.

skills.languages: Python, SQL, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: Scikit-learn, XGBoost, PyTorch, TensorFlow, HuggingFace Transformers, NumPy, Pandas, Predictive Modeling, Statistical Analysis, Feature Engineering, Model Evaluation, SHAP, Explainable AI, NLP, LLMs, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Vector Embeddings
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), AWS, GCP, FastAPI, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, Railway, Vercel, Git
